Bug Title: Logo is too short
Description: Logo is too short. all the content view perfectly but branding logo is too short
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to website
2. observe the logo
Expected Result: Re-size the logo size as client expected
Actual Result: Logo is too short

Bug Title: Incorrect Tab Title Displayed (KAF LMS Instead of KAF)
Description: When opening the application in a new browser tab, the tab title is displayed as “KAF LMS” instead of the expected “KAF”. This does not match the intended branding.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the application in a browser
2. Open it in a new tab
3. Check the tab title
Expected Result: The tab title should be displayed as “KAF”.
Actual Result: The tab title is displayed as “KAF LMS”

Bug Title: Unnecessary Language Option (BN) Displayed in Language Selector
Description: The language selector currently displays three options: English (EN), Arabic (AR), and Bengali (BN). However, only English and Arabic should be available.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the website
2. Click on the language selector dropdown
3. observe the available language options
Expected Result: Only “English (EN)” and “Arabic (AR)” should be displayed in the language selector.
Actual Result: “Bengali (BN)” option is also displayed along with English and Arabic.

Bug Title: Incorrect Error Message Display
Description: leave the required password field click set password, the system shows an incorrect or unclear error message. The message does not properly describe the issue, which may confuse users.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the login as student first time
2.after otp verification, nevigate to password page 
3. Leave required field
4. click the set password button 
5. observe the error msg showed
Expected Result: The system should display a clear and accurate error message describing the exact issue.
Actual Result: An incorrect or unclear error message is shown, which does not properly indicate the problem.

Bug Title: “Become a Teacher” Option Should Be Removed from Footer
Description: The footer section currently includes a “Become a Teacher” option, which is not required. This option should be removed to keep the footer aligned with the intended design and functionality.
Steps to Reproduce:
1.Scroll down to the footer section
2.Locate the “Become a Teacher” option
Expected Result: The “Become a Teacher” option should not be displayed in the footer.
Actual Result: The “Become a Teacher” option is visible in the footer.

Bug Title: View profile button is not working
Description: The “View Profile” button is not functioning when clicked. It does not redirect to the profile page or perform any action, which prevents users from accessing profile details.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to website
2. scroll down 
3. Click on the “View Profile” button
Expected Result: when user click view profile button it should be redirected to profile details
Actual Result: Clicking the “View Profile” button does not trigger any action.

Bug Title: Unknown Categories Displayed Under “Our Popular Courses” Heading
Description: Under the “Our Popular Courses” section, unknown categories are being displayed that do not match the actual courses available under the purchased organization plan.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the homepage
2. Scroll to the “Our Popular Courses” section
3. Observe the categories shown under the heading
Expected Result: Only relevant course categories should be diaplayed under the purchased organization plan.
Actual Result: Unknown or irrelevant categories are displayed under the “Our Popular Courses” heading.

Bug Title: Organization Profile Shows Incorrect Counts After Student Login
Description: After a student logs in, the homepage displays the organization profile. However, the counts for total students, enrollments, and available courses in the organization profile are shown as 0, even though there is existing data.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a student
2. Go to the homepage
3. Observe the organization profile section
Expected Result: The organization profile should display the correct counts for students, enrollments, and available courses based on actual data.
Actual Result: All counts (students, enrollments, available courses) are displayed as 0.

Bug Title: Update title Text – “Become an Instructor” → “Become an Organization”
Description: In the website, the title currently labeled “Become an Instructor” should be updated to “Become an Organization”
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to the landing page.
2. Scroll the page
3. Observe the title “Become an Instructor.”
Expected Result: The button should display “Become an Organization and Teach Online”
Actual Result: The button currently displays “Become an Instructor and Teach Online.”

Bug Title: Side arrow missing in both eng & arabic version
Description: In Top Rated Instructors,The side navigation arrow is missing in the UI for both English and Arabic versions.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the website.
2. Switch between English and Arabic language versions.
3. Observe the side bar in Top Rated Instructors.
Expected Result: The side arrow should be visible and functional in both English and Arabic versions
Actual Result: The side arrow is missing in both language versions.

Bug Title: Newest course position and read more button arrow position is incorrect
Description: In the Newest Courses section, the course positioning and the “Read More” button arrow are not displayed correctly
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the homepage
2. Scroll to the Newest Courses section.
3. Observe the position of course items and the “Read More” button arrow position.
Expected Result:
Newest courses should be properly aligned and positioned.

The “Read More” button arrow should be correctly aligned and directionally appropriate (LTR/RTL based on language).
Actual Result:
Newest course items are incorrectly positioned.

The “Read More” button arrow is misaligned or pointing in the wrong direction.

Bug Title: In Section Titles, Replace “Instructors” with “Organization”
Description: On the website, multiple section titles currently use the word “Instructor(s)”, which should be updated to “Organization”
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the homepage.
2. Locate the above-mentioned titles.
Expected Result:
“Top Rated Instructors” → “Top Rated Organizations”

“Quality Education Starts with Great Instructors” → “Quality Education Starts with Great Organizations”

“Hear from Our Students & Instructors” → “Hear from Our Students & Organizations”
Actual Result: The titles still display “Instructor(s)”.

Bug Title: Error Popup Message Appears When Required Fields Are Empty on Profile Update
Description: When a user leaves required fields empty and clicks the Update Profile button, an error popup message is displayed.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the profile.
2. Leave required fields empty.
3. Click on the Update Profile button.
Expected Result: Proper validation messages should be shown clearly
Actual Result: An error popup message appears when required fields are left empty.

Bug Title: “Connect Now” Button & Logo to Be Partially Hidden
Description: In the Contact Us section, when clicking the “Connect Now” button, the UI layout breaks and results in the button and logo being partially hidden.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Navigate to the Contact Us page.
2. Click on the “Connect Now” button.
3. Observe the layout after clicking.
Expected Result: The button and logo should remain fully visible and properly aligned.
Actual Result: The button and logo become partially hidden after clicking “Connect Now.”

Bug Title: Certificate Not Mapped with Course
Description: There is no mapping between course title and certificates in the system. As a result, when a student receives a certificate, they cannot identify which course the certificate belongs to.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a student
2. Complete any course
3. Click my profile icon
4. Click my certificate 
5. observe the certificate sections
Expected Result: Each certificate should clearly display with the course name so that students can easily identify it.
Actual Result: The certificate does not show the course name, so students cannot identify which course it belongs to.

Bug Title: Course Shows 100% Completion Without Quiz/Exam
Description: The system marks a course as 100% complete and generates a certificate even when the student has not completed the quiz or exam.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a student
2. Enroll in a course that includes a quiz or exam
3. Complete only the course content (skip quiz/exam)
4. Check the course progress and certificate
Expected Result: The course should not be marked as 100% complete, and the certificate should not be generated unless the student completes the quiz or exam.
Actual Result: The course shows 100% completion and the certificate is generated even without completing the quiz or exam.

Bug Title: QR Code Redirect Issue
Description: The QR code redirects to a different page. Also, the QR code size is too small, making it hard to scan.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to website 
2. Scroll to footer
3. Open the QR code
4. Scan the QR code
5. Observe the redirected page
6. Check the QR code size
Expected Result:
QR code should redirect to the correct page

QR code size should be accurate
Actual Result:
QR code redirects to a different page

QR code size visibility improper

Bug Title: Scrolling Issue on Instructor Page
Description: The Instructor page has a scrolling issue, which affects smooth navigation and user experience.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Open the app
2. Go to Instructor page
3. Try to scroll the page
Expected Result: Page should scroll smoothly without any issues
Actual Result: Scrolling is not working properly over all the page

Bug Title: Course Fee Not Hidden in Sort By List in Organization Profile
Description: In the organization profile, the “Sort By” list still shows the course fee option, which should be hidden.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. login as student in website
2. Scroll down 
3 Click Viiew Profile 
4. Click “Sort By” options
5. Check the available sorting options
Expected Result: Course fee options should not be visible in the “Sort By” list
Actual Result: Course fee options is still visible in the “Sort By” list

Bug Title: Quiz Not Auto Submitted When Timer Reaches 0
Description: When the quiz timer reaches 0 seconds, the quiz remains active. There is no auto-submit or popup, and users can still use Skip & Next buttons.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Start a quiz
2. Wait until the timer reaches 0 seconds
3. Observe the quiz behavior
Expected Result: Quiz should auto-submit or show a timeout popup and restrict further actions
Actual Result: Quiz stays active with no popup, and Skip & Next buttons still work at 0 seconds

Bug Title: Completed exam Can Be Retaken
Description: Quizzes that have already been completed can be attended again, which may affect result integrity.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Complete a quiz
2. Go back to the same quiz
3. Try to attend it again
Expected Result: Completed quizzes should not be retakable
Actual Result: Users can retake quizzes even after completing them

Bug Title: Incorrect Error Message Display
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Go to the login with wrong cradential
Expected Result: The system should display a clear and accurate error message describing the exact issue.
Actual Result: An incorrect or unclear error message is shown, which does not properly indicate the problem.

Bug Title: Incorrect Labeling: “Instructor” Used Instead of “Organization”
Description: In the organization management section, the term “Instructor” is used in multiple places where it should be labeled as “Organization.”
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the organization management in admin panel
2. Observe the labels and text
Expected Result: All relevant labels and text should use “Organization” instead of “Instructor.”
Actual Result: “Instructor” is displayed instead of “Organization” in multiple places.

Bug Title: Quiz/Exam Accessible After Course Expiry via Free Content
Description: Even after a course expires, if any class is marked as free content, students can still access the quiz or exam through that class.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Enroll in a course that has free content
2. Let the course expire
3. Access the free content class
4. Attempt to access the quiz or exam
Expected Result: After course expiry, students should not be able to access quizzes or exams, regardless of free content availability.
Actual Result: Students can access quizzes or exams through free content even after the course has expired.

Bug Title: Course Details Not Opening When Clicking on Course Card
Description: Clicking on a course card does not open the course details page. However, clicking specifically on the course name successfully opens the details.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to my courses 
2. Click on any course card (excluding the course name)
3. Then click on the course name
Expected Result: Clicking anywhere on the course card should open the course details page.
Actual Result: Course details only open when clicking on the course name; clicking on the rest of the card does not work.

Bug Title: User Profile and Password Fields Combined
Description: The user profile section and the password update fields (New Password & Confirm Password) are combined into a single section, which affects clarity and usability.
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Log in as a user
2. Go to the profile page
3. Observe the layout of profile information and password fields
Expected Result: User profile information and password update fields should be in separate sections for better clarity and user experience.
Actual Result: User profile and password fields (New Password & Confirm Password) are combined in one section.

Bug Title: Incorrect Label in Footer (Register Option)
Description: The footer does not display the correct label for organization registration. It should clearly show “Register as Organization.”
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Go to the website footer
2. Check the registration option text
Expected Result: The label should be displayed as “Register as Organization.”
Actual Result: The correct label “login to admin” is shown.
